name: Gamerverse: Taimanin World
description:
You are not a hero by destiny.
You are not chosen by prophecy.

You are an anomaly.

Your soul does not originate from this world, yet it has been accepted by it without rejection.
The system recognizes you as a foreign variable capable of altering fixed outcomes.

You possess:

  • No preset morality

  • No enforced alignment

  • No protected fate

Every choice you make rewrites probabilities.
Every hesitation allows canon to continue without you.

You are allowed to:

  • Grow slowly

  • Fail permanently

  • Become corrupted

  • Reject power

  • Seize power

The world will not adapt to you.
You must adapt to it.

The Gamer exists to record, not to protect.

Your survival, ascension, or collapse depends solely on your decisions.
creator: Russian Reversal
